历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 4289 → 5540 → 8226 → 3419 → 3549. In 2024, there was a significant rebound to 3419, and in 2025 it remained basically stable at 3549. The rankings in the past two years are significantly better than those from 2021 to 2023, showing an overall V-shaped trend of first declining and then rising. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 3549. The enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia's science/physics category was 62 in 2021, 68 in 2022, 67 in 2023, 65 in 2024, and 61 in 2025. The plan for 2026 is 57, a decrease of 4 compared to 2025, showing a slight reduction in enrollment, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks 22nd, and in recent years it has been stable at 21st–22nd, belonging to the top tier of national universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly due to the lingering public opinion from the 2019 study partner incident. On Douyin, it ranks 20th in popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. From 2022 to 2024, there were abnormal signals in the admission cutoff scores, but they have stabilized by 2025. It has A+ in Mathematics (flagship discipline), A in Chinese Language and Literature, A in Marxist Theory, A in Control Science and Engineering, A- in Clinical Medicine, A- in Law, A- in Physics, A- in Biology, A- in Electrical Engineering, A- in Software Engineering, etc., with 19 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular and recommended, which aligns well with Shandong University's strong engineering fields. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Inner Mongolia is approximately 154,000, a significant increase of about 33% compared to 2025 (approximately 116,000). The estimated number of physics category examinees is about 114,000, leading to intensified competition. Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, and its enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.3%–2.0%, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Inner Mongolian examinees have a strong preference for 985 universities on the eastern coast, and regional factors support the ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3549, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (61→57) which eases competition, the significant increase in the total number of Inner Mongolian examinees (about +33%) which intensifies competition, the somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin popularity, and the sustained heat of engineering majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be approximately 3459, slightly forward compared to 2025 (smaller ranking number), with a range of 2966–3952.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 山东大学在内蒙古自治区医学类单独招生，2021年最低录取位次2936名（计划4人），2022年2269名（计划8人），2023年2572名（计划6人），2024年7137名（计划8人），2025 年3226名（计划6人）。2026年医学类招生计划缩减至4人，较2025年缩招33.3%，计划变化幅度较大，加剧了竞争程度。从历年位次看，除2024年因批次合并等因素出现异常高位 次外，医学类位次整体在2200-3300区间波动。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其医学学科历史悠久，齐鲁医学院在国内外享有较高声誉，临床 医学专业实力突出，对高分考生具有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续高涨，临床医学（5+3一体化）作为长学制培养模式尤为热门。2026年山东大学在内蒙古医学类仅投放临床医学（五年制）和临床医学（5+3一体 化）两个专业，取消了口腔医学和预防医学，整体专业门槛提升，最低录取位次预计进一步前移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型计算及近年医学位次趋势，2026年山东大学在内蒙古自治区医学类最低录取位次预计为2531名，波动区间2278-2784名。较2025年3226名明显前移，主要受招生 计划缩减及专业结构调整影响，竞争加剧导致位次提升。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Shandong University conducts separate enrollment for medical programs in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region. The minimum admission rankings were 2936 (plan: 4) in 2021, 2269 (plan: 8) in 2022, 2572 (plan: 6) in 2023, 7137 (plan: 8) in 2024, and 3226 (plan: 6) in 2025. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is reduced to 4, a 33.3% decrease from 2025, with significant changes in plan size intensifying competition. Looking at historical rankings, except for 2024 when abnormal high rankings occurred due to batch mergers and other factors, medical rankings generally fluctuated within the 2200-3300 range.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines have a long history, with Qilu Medical College enjoying a high reputation both domestically and internationally, and its clinical medicine program is particularly outstanding, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has been rising steadily, with Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) as a long-cycle training model being particularly sought after. In 2026, Shandong University will only offer two programs in Inner Mongolia's medical category: Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program) and Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program), canceling Stomatology and Preventive Medicine. The overall program threshold is raised, and the minimum admission ranking is expected to move further forward.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model calculation and recent medical ranking trends, the minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's medical category in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region in 2026 is predicted to be 2531, with a fluctuation range of 2278-2784. Compared to 3226 in 2025, this is a significant forward shift, mainly due to the reduction in enrollment plan and adjustment of program structure, leading to intensified competition and ranking improvement.
